zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida von Sachsen於1030年出生在德國薩辛時，她的父親Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II35歲，母親Eilika von Schweinfurt45歲。她於1065年與Albert III de Namur結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1102年7月31日在比利時迪瑟 德 納姆爾享年72歲，埋葬在比利時迪瑟 德 納姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida von Sachsen于1030年出生在德国薩辛时，她的父亲Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II35岁，母亲Eilika von Schweinfurt45岁。她于1065年与Albert III de Namur结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1102年7月31日在比利时迪瑟 德 納姆爾享年72岁，埋葬在比利时迪瑟 德 納姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sachsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: probably from a placename Sachenbach in southern Germany, the first part of which is from Old High German saher ‘reed grass’ or ‘swamp’.

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida von Sachsen was born in 1030, in Saxony, Germany, her father, Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II, was 35 and her mother, Eilika von Schweinfurt, was 45. She married Albert III de Namur in 1065. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 31 July 1102, in Namur, Belgium, at the age of 72, and was buried in Namur, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida von Sachsen est née en 1030, à Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Eilika von Schweinfurt, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Albert III de Namur en 1065. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 31 juillet 1102, à Diocèse de Namur, Belgique, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Diocèse de Namur, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida von Sachsen 1030 in Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II 35 und ihre Mutter Eilika von Schweinfurt 45. Sie hat 1065 Albert III de Namur geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 31. Juli 1102 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Bistum Namur, Belgien und wurde in Bistum Namur, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida von Sachsen è nata il nel 1030 nel Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Eilika von Schweinfurt, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Albert III de Namur nel 1065. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 31 luglio 1102, nel Diocèse de Namur, Belgio, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Diocèse de Namur, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida von Sachsenが1030年にドイツサチセンで生まれた時，父Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen IIは35歳，母Eilika von Schweinfurtは45歳であった。1065年にAlbert III de Namurと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1102年7月31日にベルギーディオクeゼ ド ナムルで72歳で死去し，ベルギーディオクeゼ ド ナムルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida von Sachsen(이)가 1030년 독일 작센에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eilika von Schweinfurt(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1065년 Albert III de Namur(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1102년 7월 31일 벨기에 디오ce스 데 남어에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 디오ce스 데 남어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida von Sachsen nasceu em 1030, em Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Eilika von Schweinfurt, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Albert III de Namur em 1065. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 31 de julho de 1102, em Diocèse de Namur, Bélgica, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Diocèse de Namur, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida von Sachsen родилась в 1030 г. в местности сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Eilika von Schweinfurt, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albert III de Namur в 1065 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 31 июля 1102 г. в местности диокeс де намур, Бельгия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности диокeс де намур, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida von Sachsen nació en 1030, en Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Eilika von Schweinfurt, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Albert III de Namur en 1065. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 31 de julio de 1102, en Diocèse de Namur, Bélgica, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Diocèse de Namur, Bélgica.
